task_completion.description: Log into OpenSIS as the administrator
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OpenSIS dashboard is visible, indicating a successful login (e.g., welcome message for admin or administrator profile visible).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the Rooms management interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the OpenSIS 'Rooms' setup or management page, typically found under School Setup.

task_completion.description: Add the first room named SCI-201
task_completion.visual_evidence: The room name 'SCI-201' is visible either being typed into a new room form or listed as a saved room in the OpenSIS interface.

task_completion.description: Set the capacity of SCI-201 to 30
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '30' is visible in the capacity field corresponding to the room 'SCI-201'.

task_completion.description: Add the second room named COMP-305
task_completion.visual_evidence: The room name 'COMP-305' is visible either being typed into a new room form or listed as a saved room in the OpenSIS interface.

task_completion.description: Set the capacity of COMP-305 to 25
task_completion.visual_evidence: The number '25' is visible in the capacity field corresponding to the room 'COMP-305'.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenSIS web GUI to add the rooms
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying the OpenSIS interface, rather than terminal commands or API scripts (e.g., curl).

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches a genuine OpenSIS web application, not a text editor, mock-up, or local HTML file.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the application UI using a database client
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent using a database management tool (like phpMyAdmin, psql, or mysql CLI) to directly insert the room records into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent must log into OpenSIS using username 'admin' and password 'Admin@123'. The target school is Demo School. The agent needs to add two rooms: 'SCI-201' with a capacity of 30, and 'COMP-305' with a capacity of 25. Verification should confirm these exact room names and capacities are visible in the OpenSIS Rooms interface.
